0x003e6464.author: Yabashiri
0x003e6464.note:
[8-bit] Show Henshin Scenes
0x00 | Type A (Full Scenes)
0x01 | Type B (Skip Event Henshin Scenes)
0x02 | Type C (Skip All Henshin Scenes)

0x0041eff2.author: Yabashiri
0x0041eff2.note:
[8-bit] [Bitfield] Screen Transition Request Flags
Bit 6 | Screen change requested inside the current location
Bit 7 | Location change requested

0x0041f080.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f080.note:
[32-bit] [Pointer] Current Scene Pointer
+0x6C: [32-bit] [ASCII] Current Scene ID bytes 1-4
+0x70: [32-bit] [ASCII] Current Scene ID bytes 5-8

0x0041f084.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f084.note:
[32-bit] Current Screen Number (0 = Min, 34 = Max)
Changes relative to the location, e.g. inside Power Plant Entrance you have Front Desk Screen, Main Corridor Screen, etc.

0x0041f08c.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f08c.note:
[32-bit] Current Location Number

Rider Timeline Variant:
Range Start + 0 = Ichigo (A)
Range Start + 1 = V3 (B)
Range Start + 2 = BLACK (C)
Range Start + 3 = Agito (D)

0x00 - 0x03 | Power Plant Entrance
0x04 - 0x07 | Power Plant Chimney
0x08 - 0x0B | Power Plant Loading Bay
0x0C - 0x0F | Power Plant Transmission Facility
0x10 - 0x13 | Power Plant B1F Passage
0x14 - 0x17 | Power Plant Central Control Room
0x18 - 0x1B | Power Plant Director's Office
0x1C - 0x1F | Power Plant Transformer Room
0x20 - 0x23 | Power Plant Fuel Storage
0x24 - 0x27 | Power Plant B2F Passage
0x28 - 0x2B | Power Plant Turbine Room
0x2C - 0x2F | Power Plant Fuel Pool
0x30 - 0x33 | Base Underground Passage
0x34 - 0x37 | Base Underground Passage
0x38 - 0x3B | Base Old Mine Tunnel
0x3C - 0x3F | Base Underground Transport Route
0x40 - 0x43 | Base Passage
0x44 - 0x47 | Base Gas Laboratory
0x48 - 0x4B | Base Armory
0x4C - 0x4F | Power Plant Shaft
0x50 - 0x53 | Base Main Passage
0x54 - 0x57 | Special Base Plan/Lab/Dome Rooms
0x58 - 0x5B | Unknown / Missing Number Area
0x5C - 0x5F | Base Command Room
0x60 - 0x63 | ??? Time-Space Control Room
0x64 - 0x67 | Quarry
0x68 - 0x6B | Base Poison Gas Plant
0x6C - 0x6F | Base Lighthouse
0x70 - 0x73 | Coast
0x74 - 0x77 | Undersea Base
0x78 - 0x7B | ??? Cultivation Chamber

0x0041f090.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f090.note:
[32-bit] Requested Location Number
Target location written before a location transition. See @0x41f08c

0x0041f0a0.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f0a0.note:
[32-bit] Current Chapter Number
0x01 | Chapter 1
0x02 | Chapter 2
0x03 | Chapter 3
0x04 | Chapter 4
0x05 | Chapter 5 Part One
0x06 | Chapter 5 Part Two
0x07 | Chapter 6

0x0041f0a4.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f0a4.note:
[32-bit] Kaijin Finisher Count (0 = Min, 999 = Max)
Increases when defeating a kaijin with a Special Move

0x0041f0a8.author: Yabashiri
0x0041f0a8.note:
[32-bit] Enemy Defeat Count (0 = Min, 9999 = Max)
Increases when the player defeats a trooper
